desiredRole.description: Role of the tenant in the multitenant organization. The possible values are: owner, member, unknownFutureValue.

desiredState.description: State of the tenant in the multitenant organization currently being processed. The possible values are: pending, active, removed, unknownFutureValue. Read-only.

details.description: Details that explain the processing status if any. Read-only.

status.description: Processing state of the asynchronous job. The possible values are: notStarted, running, succeeded, failed, unknownFutureValue. Read-only.
